steps.title: Read the noun phrase
steps.content: The sentence needs the noun pieces followed directly by the prepositional phrase of pottery ever found. The phrase completes the noun idea and should not be separated from it.

steps.title: Leave the phrase unpunctuated
steps.content: A adds a colon, B adds an unnecessary comma, and D adds an unnecessary dash. None is needed between a noun and its modifying prepositional phrase. The answer is C.
